历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 16706 → 18630 → 17545 → 50642 → 20939. In 2024, there was an abnormal fluctuation due to the transition of the Henan college entrance examination reform, and in 2025 it recovered to about 20939. In the past two years, the overall trend has been moving backward. The enrollment plan for this university in Henan science (physics category) from 2021 to 2025 was 217, 215, 210, 226, and 214 students respectively. In 2026, it significantly expanded to 296 students, an increase of 82 students (about 38.3%) compared to 2025. The expansion is substantial, theoretically easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks approximately 49th, up 3 places from 2025 (52nd), with a stable and slightly improving level. The reputation evaluation in 2023 was neutral/mixed, and in 2026, no significant negative signals were seen in the reputation data. The comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 94th, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a medium-low level, and no significant signs of increased application attention. In 2023, there was an abnormal signal in the admission score line but it was low attention. Transportation Engineering is A+ (top in the country) and Civil Engineering is A, both are flagship disciplines of the university, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Computer Science have high social popularity, recommended or highly recommended, highly aligned with the university's advantageous engineering directions. The social popularity of Civil Engineering and Architecture is divided/warning, which may suppress applications to civil engineering majors. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Henan Province is about 1.2 million (an increase of about 32% compared to the total of about 907,000 for physics and history categories in 2025), with a significant increase in the number of candidates, intensifying competition. 2026; Southwest Jiaotong University.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 20939, the significant expansion in 2026 (+38.3%), the substantial increase in the number of candidates (about +32%), the slight rise in university ranking, and the continued high popularity of engineering majors, the expansion rate is slightly larger than the candidate growth rate, but the improvement in university level and engineering popularity enhance attraction for high-scoring candidates. It is expected that the minimum ranking will slightly move backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 25953, with a range of 25453–26453.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 25453–26453, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 25000), you can focus on applying for A+ discipline-related majors such as Transportation and Electrical Engineering and Automation. If your ranking is close to the upper limit, be cautious when choosing Tier 1 majors and prioritize basic disciplines like Mathematics and Statistics in Tier 2.
